package rulecoverage

func PositiveMissingRateLimitingOnAuthEndpoint() string {
    ruleID := "missing_rate_limiting_on_auth_endpoint"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "login/authentication handler functions (name contains `Login`, `Authenticate`, `SignIn`) that don't reference rate limiting, throttling, or brute-force protection mechanisms"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
